title: Lab: Repair a Relief-Donation Pickup Form
summary: Lab: Repair a Relief-Donation Pickup Form retrieves prior skills in an original keyboard and naming failure in a donation pickup request scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply keyboard focus, accessible names descriptions in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real keyboard and naming failure in a donation pickup request artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Keyboard and naming failure in a donation pickup request case 1: remove focus outlines after mouse use because keyboard users can remember position.
Keyboard and naming failure in a donation pickup request case 1: keep DOM and visual order aligned, use native controls, preserve visible focus, and test every task without a pointer.
Keyboard and naming failure in a donation pickup request case 1: add tabindex zero to every heading and paragraph so all content becomes interactive.
